title: Spotify Lyrics Visualizer
description:
A live Spotify lyrics visualizer with WebGL effects, real-time audio reactivity, and mood-adaptive visuals.

Features:
• Synced lyrics pulled automatically from lrclib.net
• Audio visualizer that reacts to the music's bass, mids, and highs
• Album art display with mood-colored glow
• Play / Pause / Skip controls built in
• Smooth WebGL feedback trails, glow, and distortion effects
• Mouse hover effect — letters part as your cursor moves through them
• Fully customizable via the Wallpaper Engine settings panel

Requires the Spotify Bridge companion app to be running. Download link and setup guide in the comments.

showdebug.title: Show Debug Overlay
showdebug.text: Show debug overlay with FPS, mood, and audio levels

demomode.title: Demo Mode
demomode.text: Use built-in demo lyrics (useful without the Spotify bridge)

feedbackdecay.title: Trail / Ghost Intensity
feedbackdecay.text: How strongly the feedback trail persists (0 = off, 1 = heavy)

glowstrength.title: Glow Strength
glowstrength.text: Bloom / glow intensity on the lyric text

basefontsize.title: Base Font Size
basefontsize.text: Font size in px at 1920×1080 resolution

refractionstrength.title: Liquid Refraction
refractionstrength.text: Text appears to float on a rippling liquid surface — noise-gradient lens distortion

persptilt.title: 3D Perspective Tilt
persptilt.text: Animates the text on a slowly rotating 3D plane — depth parallax included

causticsintensity.title: Caustic Patterns
causticsintensity.text: Animated light-through-water caustic shimmer across the whole scene

iridescence.title: Iridescent Shimmer
iridescence.text: Holographic prismatic sweep band across the lyric text

godrays.title: God Rays
godrays.text: Volumetric light shafts radiating outward from the text center

extrusiondepth.title: 3D Text Extrusion
extrusiondepth.text: Depth layers behind the text for a floating 3D extrusion — direction rotates over time

hovereffect.title: Mouse Hover Effect
hovereffect.text: Lyric text parts around your cursor using Pretext layout engine (requires Mouse Interaction enabled in WE settings)

hoverradius.title: Hover Gap Size
hoverradius.text: How wide the cursor parting gap is (px)

entrancestyle.title: Text Entrance Style
entrancestyle.text: How each new lyric line appears on screen

outlinewidth.title: Text Outline Width
outlinewidth.text: Glowing mood-colored stroke around the lyrics (0 = off)

waveamplitude.title: Wave Amplitude
waveamplitude.text: Peak character wave height in pixels (used by Wave entrance style)

beatpulse.title: Beat Pulse Rings
beatpulse.text: Expanding rings that radiate outward from the text on bass hits

outerglow.title: Outer Aura Intensity
outerglow.text: Soft wide halo around the lyric text (0 = off, 3 = strong)

rainbowintensity.title: Rainbow Text
rainbowintensity.text: Prismatic hue-cycling color across the lyric text (0 = off)

schemeid.title: Color Scheme Override
schemeid.text: Force a specific mood color (0 = auto from lyrics)
